relative_path: Data & Figures/Data/1. t-CycIF/4_4 - PRITTI cohort experiment/4_4-experimental_files/3rd round experiment + validation of CCNE/CCNE validation results _2_3_4 cell cycle.pptx
full_text:
CCNE

Antibody validation

Order and results of the conducted experiments

Validation with Kauppi lab alliquote 1:1000 -> correct staining, we then ordered this vial
Exp2, full slide set, CCNE 1:1000 + pChk1 1:200 -> CCNE did not show any good positive signal in nuclei, cytoplasmic signal in stroma and high background. 
We realized it is actually not the same lot number as in Kauppi lab (but same clone and concentration)
Intermediate validation: CCNE 1:1500 or CCNE1:2000. Thought to check if diluting more our ab worked-> Really good pattern, 1:2000 had too low signal, so something in between 1:1600 was preferred
Exp3, full slide set, CCNE 1:1600 + pChk1 1:200 -> Fails again, multiple bubble-like structures and extremely low signal, but different from results in Exp2, here we have some nuclear signals. It is closer to the expected staining 
Exp04, subselection of the slide set 4. Aimed to test a cross reactivity between CCNE and pChk1. Same dilutions were used (1:1600, 1:200) this time some of the slides were stained only with CCNE and some in combination -> We observed much better staining, more specific pattern and with much higher intensity, but also saw some aggregates and bubble-like structures
Additional validation with 7_01 slides from Zhihan (observe difference by using a different secondary, in this case mouse 555)

110 iTubR sample - thought to be CCNEamp

4_3 experiment (pChk1+CCNE)

DAPI CCNE

DAPI CCNE

4_04 experiment (CCNE only)

647 exp time:0.25s

647 exp time:0.15s

Lower (0.15, 0.2) exp times were tested and were not enough to detect if the sample was +
